// note: Shared compiler settings for the Node packages (core, cli); web is standalone. Each package extends this and adds its own outDir/include. paths let the workspace resolve cross-package imports to source during typecheck, while built artifacts resolve through the pnpm workspace symlink at runtime; paths resolve relative to this file's directory (the repo root). types is named explicitly because pnpm isolates packages and automatic @types discovery proved unreliable across the workspace.
